description: Style NoteStylish sandals for women from catwalk with the trademark band across the foot. Crafted for the woman who never compromises on style and comfort, this trendy sandal from Catwalk makes for a fab addition to your wardrobe. With a sleek design and simple silhouette it looks great with all kinds of clothing.Heel: 3''Product DetailsBlunt toed sandals with thong style straps and a thick elasticated multicolour band from the midfoot Has a black heel and a brown footbedTPR outsole with a plastic heel capMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
